title: AOR | All of the Random
description: Random things that i like together, but i will improve more things, and personality to it
body:
This modpack was made by combining various things I like in Minecraft — it is a personal selection of mods that bring magic, technology, and many visual effects, as well as animations that give more life to the game. My main focus is multiplayer: many of the modifications help with interaction and the social experience for those who play with friends.

I am still working on adding more content and giving more personality to the project, so expect future updates and improvements! I want the modpack to always have something special, with my personal touch, as well as being fun to play both alone and on servers. Feel free to suggest ideas or participate in this creation!

-----=-----
Technical Description
-----=-----

Magic and Technology: (Example: Draconic Evolution and Mystical Agriculture)

  - These mods radically expand the possibilities of automation, energy generation, item manipulation, magical farming, spells, and supernatural powers. They allow everything from automated networks to advanced systems for resource production and magic.

Exploration, New Structures, and Biomes: (Example: YUNG’s Better Dungeons and Biomes O’ Plenty)

   - They drastically transform the world, add unique biomes, new structures to explore, and extra challenges to conquer.

Customization and Visuals: (Example: Iris Shaders and Hold My Items)

  - They enhance the game's aesthetics, with more natural animations, modern visual effects, dynamic lighting, customization of armor, tools, and characters.

Multiplayer and Social Interactivity: (Example: Plasmo Voice, Chat Heads, and Emotecraft)

  - They enable voice communication, visual identities in chat, decoration of shared environments, and ping systems for collaborative strategies.

Fun and New Features: (Example: Vampirism and Mowzie's Mobs)

  - They bring new rare items, accessories, pets, unique mobs, magical equipment, added comfort (beds, sleeping bags, backpacks), gliding with hang gliders, and extra protection against dangers.

-----=-----

If you are having issues with the modpack, you can try contacting me on my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/8vqjCXzKVW)
